message:
chore(artifacts): refresh verification evidence timestamps for section 10.15

Updates verification_evidence.json and verification_summary.md
timestamps from 2026-02-26 to 2026-02-27 across section 10.15:
- bd-2g6r, bd-721z: Regenerated verification runs
- ambient_authority_findings.json: Updated line numbers reflecting
  code changes in eviction_saga.rs and state_model.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
